name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-20
title: SKILL.md Notes section uses wrong find-feature.py interface (--list-json / --list)
description: SKILL.md lines 39 and 46 reference 'find-feature.py --list-json' and 'find-feature.py --list' with double-dash prefix. The actual interface (per .claude/features/contract/scripts/find-feature.py) is positional: 'find-feature.py <repo-root> list' or 'find-feature.py <repo-root> list-json'. Doc must match implementation.

history.note: Wave 4 fix; verified by test/test-bug-fixes-wave4.py and test-resolve-scope.py
